hardware: one TPU v6e device from yxtpu-v6e8-dev

sglang_jax.layout: packed B=1, T=16384 with eight 2048-token segments
sglang_jax.reverse_mode_error: ValueError: Linearization failed to produce known values for all output primals. This is typically caused by attempting to differentiate a function uses an operation that does not support reverse-mode autodiff.

caveat: Orientation microbenchmark, not a full-model comparison. SGLang-JAX includes packed-variable-length alignment, gather/scatter, and gate activation; the current MaxText core includes Q/K L2 normalization but receives already activated log decay.
